loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and will render as honest-blanks; only fed feeders (UPS, BPDB) report live data.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power status for all feeders; 4 of 10 members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and render as blank rows per roster policy.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Panel members GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1, GIC-02-N1-Solar Incomer-2, GIC-15-N10-PCC-01 (Transformer-01), GIC-15-N11-PCC-01 (Transformer-02), GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 CL:600KVA, and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 CL:600KVA are dark (no data); narrative is generated from active feeders only.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power for live feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04); 2 feeders (UPS-05/06) are dark and honest-blank. Contracted capacity is unknown for this asset, so the denominator and consumed percentage are left blank.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend; 2 of 8 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their per-member leaves.

loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate stats from 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their slots.
